steps.instruction:
Here are some stars arranged in rows:
⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐
⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐
steps.explanation: With bigger groups, it helps to organize objects in rows of 10.

steps.instruction: Count the top row from left to right.

steps.subgoalLabel: Keep counting in the second row
steps.instruction: Do NOT start at 1 again. Keep counting from 11.
steps.explanation: After 10, the numbers go: 11, 12, 13, 14. These are called the teen numbers.

steps.instruction: The last number you said is the total.
steps.work: The last number is 14, so there are 14 stars.
steps.explanation: There are 14 stars in all. That is 10 and 4 more.
This is a large group. We will count row by row.
After the teens (11-19), the next number is 20.
20 is the biggest number we count to in kindergarten. It means two groups of 10.
